testcase.name: merge_summary::merge_summary.py::file_exists
testcase.system-out: file=common/log_parser/merge_summary.py suite=merge_summary phase=case type=file_exists warning=False message=File exists

testcase.name: merge_summary::merge_summary.py::python_compiles
testcase.system-out: file=common/log_parser/merge_summary.py suite=merge_summary phase=case type=py_compile warning=False message=Python compilation succeeded

testcase.name: merge_summary::merge_summary.py::has_main_guard
testcase.system-out: file=common/log_parser/merge_summary.py suite=merge_summary phase=case type=main_guard warning=False message=Main guard found

testcase.name: merge_summary::merge_summary.py::cli_no_args_fails
testcase.system-out:
file=common/log_parser/merge_summary.py suite=merge_summary phase=case type=cli warning=False message=CLI check passed details: Command: /usr/bin/python3 /home/vepav01/arm-systemready/common/log_parser/merge_summary.py Shell mode: no Timeout seconds: 20 Timed out: no Exit code: 2 --- STDOUT ---
--- STDERR --- usage: merge_summary.py [-h] input_file_paths [input_file_paths ...] merged_file_path merge_summary.py: error: the following arguments are required: input_file_paths, merged_file_path

testcase.name: merge_summary::merge_summary.py::cli_one_arg_fails
testcase.system-out:
file=common/log_parser/merge_summary.py suite=merge_summary phase=case type=cli warning=False message=CLI check passed details: Command: /usr/bin/python3 /home/vepav01/arm-systemready/common/log_parser/merge_summary.py /home/vepav01/arm-systemready/common/reports/_work/merge_summary/merge_summary/5_cli_one_arg_fails/bsa_summary.html Shell mode: no Timeout seconds: 20 Timed out: no Exit code: 2 --- STDOUT ---
--- STDERR --- usage: merge_summary.py [-h] input_file_paths [input_file_paths ...] merged_file_path merge_summary.py: error: the following arguments are required: merged_file_path

testcase.name: merge_summary::merge_summary.py::cli_missing_input_file_fails
testcase.system-out:
file=common/log_parser/merge_summary.py suite=merge_summary phase=case type=cli warning=False message=CLI check passed details: Command: /usr/bin/python3 /home/vepav01/arm-systemready/common/log_parser/merge_summary.py /home/vepav01/arm-systemready/common/reports/_work/merge_summary/merge_summary/6_cli_missing_input_file_fails/missing_bsa_summary.html /home/vepav01/arm-systemready/common/reports/_work/merge_summary/merge_summary/6_cli_missing_input_file_fails/missing_fwts_summary.html /home/vepav01/arm-systemready/common/reports/_work/merge_summary/merge_summary/6_cli_missing_input_file_fails/acs_summary.html Shell mode: no Timeout seconds: 20 Timed out: no Exit code: 1 --- STDOUT ---
--- STDERR --- Traceback (most recent call last): File "/home/vepav01/arm-systemready/common/log_parser/merge_summary.py", line 51, in <module> merge_files(args.input_file_paths, args.merged_file_path) File "/home/vepav01/arm-systemready/common/log_parser/merge_summary.py", line 29, in merge_files file_extension, content = read_file(file_path) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ File "/home/vepav01/arm-systemready/common/log_parser/merge_summary.py", line 22, in read_file with open(file_path, "r") as file: ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ FileNotFoundError: [Errno 2] No such file or directory: '/home/vepav01/arm-systemready/common/reports/_work/merge_summary/merge_summary/6_cli_missing_input_file_fails/missing_bsa_summary.html'

testcase.name: merge_summary::merge_summary.py::cli_merges_two_files_into_output
testcase.system-out:
file=common/log_parser/merge_summary.py suite=merge_summary phase=case type=cli warning=False message=CLI check passed details: Command: /usr/bin/python3 /home/vepav01/arm-systemready/common/log_parser/merge_summary.py /home/vepav01/arm-systemready/common/reports/_work/merge_summary/merge_summary/7_cli_merges_two_files_into_output/bsa_summary.html /home/vepav01/arm-systemready/common/reports/_work/merge_summary/merge_summary/7_cli_merges_two_files_into_output/fwts_summary.html /home/vepav01/arm-systemready/common/reports/_work/merge_summary/merge_summary/7_cli_merges_two_files_into_output/acs_summary.html Shell mode: no Timeout seconds: 20 Timed out: no Exit code: 0 --- STDOUT ---
--- STDERR ---

testcase.name: merge_summary::merge_summary.py::cli_missing_second_input_fails_even_if_first_exists
testcase.system-out:
file=common/log_parser/merge_summary.py suite=merge_summary phase=case type=cli warning=False message=CLI check passed details: Command: /usr/bin/python3 /home/vepav01/arm-systemready/common/log_parser/merge_summary.py /home/vepav01/arm-systemready/common/reports/_work/merge_summary/merge_summary/12_cli_missing_second_input_fails_even_if_first_exists/bsa_summary.html /home/vepav01/arm-systemready/common/reports/_work/merge_summary/merge_summary/12_cli_missing_second_input_fails_even_if_first_exists/fwts_summary_missing.html /home/vepav01/arm-systemready/common/reports/_work/merge_summary/merge_summary/12_cli_missing_second_input_fails_even_if_first_exists/acs_summary.html Shell mode: no Timeout seconds: 20 Timed out: no Exit code: 1 --- STDOUT ---

testcase.name: merge_summary::merge_summary.py::cli_binary_or_non_utf8_input_fails_cleanly
testcase.system-out:
file=common/log_parser/merge_summary.py suite=merge_summary phase=case type=cli warning=False message=CLI check passed details: Command: /usr/bin/python3 /home/vepav01/arm-systemready/common/log_parser/merge_summary.py /home/vepav01/arm-systemready/common/reports/_work/merge_summary/merge_summary/14_cli_binary_or_non_utf8_input_fails_cleanly/corrupt_summary.html /home/vepav01/arm-systemready/common/reports/_work/merge_summary/merge_summary/14_cli_binary_or_non_utf8_input_fails_cleanly/acs_summary.html Shell mode: no Timeout seconds: 20 Timed out: no Exit code: 1 --- STDOUT ---
--- STDERR --- Traceback (most recent call last): File "/home/vepav01/arm-systemready/common/log_parser/merge_summary.py", line 51, in <module> merge_files(args.input_file_paths, args.merged_file_path) File "/home/vepav01/arm-systemready/common/log_parser/merge_summary.py", line 29, in merge_files file_extension, content = read_file(file_path) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ File "/home/vepav01/arm-systemready/common/log_parser/merge_summary.py", line 23, in read_file return file_extension, file.read() ^^^^^^^^^^^ File "<frozen codecs>", line 322, in decode UnicodeDecodeError: 'utf-8' codec can't decode byte 0xff in position 0: invalid start byte

testcase.system-out:
file=common/log_parser/merge_summary.py suite=merge_summary phase=case type=cli warning=False message=CLI check passed details: Command: /usr/bin/python3 /home/vepav01/arm-systemready/common/log_parser/merge_summary.py /home/vepav01/arm-systemready/common/reports/_work/merge_summary/merge_summary/15_cli_output_parent_directory_missing_fails/bsa_summary.html /home/vepav01/arm-systemready/common/reports/_work/merge_summary/merge_summary/15_cli_output_parent_directory_missing_fails/missing_dir/acs_summary.html Shell mode: no Timeout seconds: 20 Timed out: no Exit code: 1 --- STDOUT ---
